title: Apply pest animal control techniques
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply pest animal control techniques demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for pest control

pcs.text: Identify control techniques to be used in the pest management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify control techniques to be used in the pest management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify control techniques to be used in the pest management plan.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks associated with the control technique and apply controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks associated with the control technique and apply controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks associated with the control technique and apply controls.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards and risks in the workplace that could adversely impact on the environment, off-target animals and public and apply controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards and risks in the workplace that could adversely impact on the environment, off-target animals and public and apply controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards and risks in the workplace that could adversely impact on the environment, off-target animals and public and apply controls.

pcs.text: Select and check materials, equipment and vehicles according to pest management plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and check materials, equipment and vehicles according to pest management plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and check materials, equipment and vehicles according to pest management plan.

pcs.text: Clean, calibrate and prepare equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, calibrate and prepare equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, calibrate and prepare equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Obtain permits, permissions and licences for affected properties and follow appropriate notification plan for stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain permits, permissions and licences for affected properties and follow appropriate notification plan for stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain permits, permissions and licences for affected properties and follow appropriate notification plan for stakeholders.

pcs.text: Prepare timeline for pest control operation according to industry best practise or protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare timeline for pest control operation according to industry best practise or protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare timeline for pest control operation according to industry best practise or protocols.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for pest control

elements.title: Implement pest control

pcs.text: Identify target and non-target animals according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify target and non-target animals according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify target and non-target animals according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select site to maximise impact of control methods on target animals and minimise impact on non-target animals.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select site to maximise impact of control methods on target animals and minimise impact on non-target animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select site to maximise impact of control methods on target animals and minimise impact on non-target animals.

pcs.text: Check planned control technique applies to current target pest, site, current conditions and timing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check planned control technique applies to current target pest, site, current conditions and timing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check planned control technique applies to current target pest, site, current conditions and timing.

pcs.text: Install notification and warning signage according to control plan and health and safety in the workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install notification and warning signage according to control plan and health and safety in the workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install notification and warning signage according to control plan and health and safety in the workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Carry out control activities according to control plan and health and safety in the workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out control activities according to control plan and health and safety in the workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out control activities according to control plan and health and safety in the workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Follow control timelines for control technique
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow control timelines for control technique?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow control timelines for control technique.

pcs.text: Maintain records of control plan activities and outcomes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of control plan activities and outcomes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of control plan activities and outcomes according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor site according to control plan and local conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor site according to control plan and local conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor site according to control plan and local conditions.

pcs.text: Euthanise animals according to pest control plan and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Euthanise animals according to pest control plan and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Euthanise animals according to pest control plan and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement pest control

elements.title: Complete the pest control work

pcs.text: Ensure equipment and unused resources are reconciled against plan and removed from site according to pest control plan and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure equipment and unused resources are reconciled against plan and removed from site according to pest control plan and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure equipment and unused resources are reconciled against plan and removed from site according to pest control plan and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste and animal carcasses and restore site according to pest control plan, workplace and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste and animal carcasses and restore site according to pest control plan, workplace and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste and animal carcasses and restore site according to pest control plan, workplace and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store equipment and materials according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and store equipment and materials according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store equipment and materials according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report results of control activities according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report results of control activities according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report results of control activities according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete the pest control work

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
